name: shop-jeweler
summary: A jeweler's shop. Polished counter with glass display cases of rings and gems, a back workroom with a tiny anvil and delicate tools. A guarded safe in the corner. Quiet, expensive.

accent.purpose: carpet or polished marble customer zone

primary_palette.note: classic jeweler — display-heavy front, safe in back
gallery-style — multiple cases visible from entry
master-jeweler shop — active workbench in view

story_prompts: commission — a noble describing a necklace, jeweler sketching on a slate
appraisal — a questionable 'heirloom' and a suspicious customer
heist in progress — safe open, jeweler bound, thieves at the door
closing ritual — jeweler locking every case, safe, door, then the inner gate

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright focused light (0.5) — gems need to sparkle

anti_patterns: don't clutter — luxury needs breathing room around each display
a jeweler's safe is heavy and permanent — place it against an interior wall
workbench stays in a controlled side zone — customers don't touch tools
